sr.title: Milojko Spajić na Ekonomskom forumu: Crna Gora je spremna za budućnost
sr.excerpt: Predsjednik pokreta Evropa sad govorio je o ekonomskim reformama i evropskom putu Crne Gore.
body: Crna Gora ima priliku da kroz stabilne javne finansije, veće plate i evropske reforme ubrza svoj razvojni put.
Fokus pokreta ostaje na rezultatima koji direktno popravljaju standard građana.

en.title: Milojko Spajić at the Economic Forum: Montenegro is ready for the future
en.excerpt: The president of Europe Now spoke about economic reforms and Montenegro's European path.
body: Montenegro has an opportunity to accelerate development through stable public finances, higher wages and European reforms.
The movement remains focused on results that directly improve citizens' living standards.

sr.title: Novi članovi iz Nikšića pristupili pokretu Evropa sad!
sr.excerpt: Naša mreža svakim danom postaje jača. Hvala vam na povjerenju!
body: Lokalna mreža pokreta nastavlja da se širi kroz direktan razgovor sa građanima i rad na terenu.
Nikšić ostaje važan centar za organizaciono jačanje i programsku debatu.

en.title: New members from Nikšić joined the Europe Now Movement!
en.excerpt: Our network is growing stronger every day. Thank you for your trust!
body: The movement's local network continues to grow through direct conversations with citizens and field work.
Nikšić remains an important center for organizational growth and program discussion.

sr.title: Rekordna turistička sezona na pomolu
sr.excerpt: Crna Gora bilježi rast broja turista i prihoda od turizma.
body: Turizam ostaje jedna od ključnih razvojnih grana Crne Gore i važan izvor novih radnih mjesta.
Cilj je duža sezona, bolja infrastruktura i snažnija promocija zemlje na evropskim tržištima.

en.title: A record tourism season is ahead
en.excerpt: Montenegro is recording growth in tourist arrivals and tourism revenue.
body: Tourism remains one of Montenegro's key development sectors and an important source of new jobs.
The goal is a longer season, better infrastructure and stronger promotion on European markets.
